verdict.answer_first: B; sentence 1 gives the bottom line: "HTTPS is just HTTP running inside a TLS tunnel" and names the 3 guarantees immediately.
verdict.decisiveness: B; it keeps one core model, while A ends by surveying options: "certificate chain validation, the Diffie-Hellman math, or how TLS 1.3 differs from 1.2".
verdict.actionability: B; its prescription is savable: "Certificates answer... Diffie-Hellman answers... symmetric AEAD cipher answers..."
